paper_map.title: Effect of Al Content on Inclusions in Fe-15Mn-xAl-C Low-Density Steel
paper_map.abstract_summary: This study investigates the effect of Al content (1, 3, 5 wt%) on inclusion characteristics in Fe-15Mn-xAl-C low-density steel through laboratory smelting and FE-SEM/EDS analysis. Main inclusion types are Al2O3, AlN, MnS, TiN and their composites; with increasing Al, the number percentage of Al2O3 decreases while AlN increases, and the size distribution shifts toward larger inclusions. FactSage calculations show increased Al raises liquidus, lowers solidus, narrows austenite region, expands ferrite region, and delays the precipitation of AlN, MnS and TiN. 2D mismatch theory indicates Al2O3, AlN and TiN can act as heterogeneous nucleation sites for MnS, and Al2O3 also for AlN.
paper_map.research_objective: To elucidate how Al content affects solidification route and inclusion formation mechanisms (type, number, size, precipitation sequence, and heterogeneous nucleation) in Fe-15Mn-xAl-C low-density steel.
material_systems: Inclusion phases: Al2O3, AlN, MnS, TiN
Composite inclusions: Al2O3-MnS, AlN-MnS, TiN-MnS, Al2O3-AlN-MnS
main_process_variables: Holding time after deoxidizer addition: 60 min for Al addition after ferromanganese
Cooling: furnace cooling to room temperature
Sample preparation: electrolytic extraction (nonaqueous) and metallographic polishing
expected_information_axis: microstructure (inclusion type, number percentage, size distribution, morphology)
solidification route (liquidus/solidus temperatures, FCC/BCC phase regions)
mechanism (precipitation sequence, effect of Al on N solubility, heterogeneous nucleation via 2D mismatch)
figure_evidence (inclusion morphology maps, solidification path schematics, mismatch calculation tables)

key_sections.purpose: Background on Fe-Mn-Al-C low-density steels, literature review on Al effect on inclusions, and identification of research gap on solidification route and inclusion formation in Fe-15Mn-xAl-C.

Description of smelting process for three Al levels, raw materials, and analytical methods including chemical analysis, metallographic preparation, electrolytic extraction, and FE-SEM/EDS characterization.
Presentation of chemical compositions, inclusion morphologies and types, and number and size distributions of inclusions.
Analysis of Al content effects on solidification route using FactSage, precipitation behavior of AlN, TiN, MnS, and complex inclusion formation mechanisms based on 2D mismatch theory.
Summary of key findings regarding inclusion types, percentages, size distribution, solidification route changes, and heterogeneous nucleation roles of Al2O3, AlN, and TiN.
